# Cascade Shape Worked Example

## Organic-looking curve

- Day 1: 2 posts
- Day 2: 5 posts
- Day 3: 14 posts
- Day 4: 40 posts
- Day 5: 70 posts
- Day 6: 50 posts

This suggests gradual audience discovery.

## Manufactured-looking curve

- Day 1 hour 1: 80 posts
- Day 1 hour 2: 10 posts
- Day 1 hour 3: 4 posts
- Day 2: 3 posts

This suggests a seed wave or campaign burst.

## Caveat

Launches, press embargoes, and live events can produce sharp bursts legitimately.
